column1: # manifest.tsv — Plane 1: GLOBAL system CLIs only (installed via brew/pacman, never
# vendored). sprout validates presence and, with --install-clis or the wizard's CLI
# picker, installs the missing ones. TAB-separated.
# Columns:  name  brew_pkg  pacman_pkg  phase  types(comma-sep; "core"=every project)  desc
# NOTE: project-level dev tools (playwright, biome, eslint, …) do NOT belong here —
# they are installed per project by the chosen JS package manager (pnpm/npm/yarn/bun),
# not globally. The web recipe handles those. See cli.md for the full breakdown.

column6: fuzzy picker for the terminal (filter anything)
read & transform JSON from the command line
same as jq, but for YAML
GitHub from the terminal (PRs, issues, releases)
visual git UI in the terminal (stage, commit, branch)
task runner — save commands in a justfile
scan the repo for leaked secrets/keys
